bio: WWII-era and Gilded Age romance. I'm drawn to women who had to be clever to survive, and the men who underestimated them once and never again. Three books in, still nervous every time I hit publish.
faceConcept: A woman in her late thirties with auburn waves in a 1940s set, red lipstick, a thoughtful tilt of the head, soft sepia photographic light.
